Updates an existing user.

Updates an existing user.
User - Class in com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.user
Represents a user in the system.
User() - Constructor for class com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.user.User
 
USER - Enum constant in enum class com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.model.Role
USER role represents a regular user with limited permissions, such as booking events and viewing their bookings.
UserController - Class in com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.user
REST controller for managing users.

Constructs a UserController with the required service.

Returns the value of the userId record component.
userName() - Method in record class com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.payment.PaymentResponse
Returns the value of the userName record component.

Repository interface for managing User entities.
UserService - Class in com.keyin.ticketnestbackend.rest.user
Service class for managing user-related operations.
